markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review partnership progress and confirm Phase 2 continuation.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Phase 2 Confirmed:** Vizcom will continue the partnership into Phase 2, with the opt-out deadline of Dec 29 passing without issue.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**New Site Launch:** The new website launch is delayed to the first week of January 2025 to complete final QA and avoid holiday stress.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Critical Blocker:** Google Search Console (GSC) is not tracking data, preventing performance measurement for the new site and its content.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Image Quality Gap:** AI-generated images lack Vizcom's brand quality; GrowthX will provide new design examples for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Feedback & Phase 2 Confirmation

  - [Vizcom confirmed the partnership will continue into Phase 2, as the Dec 29 opt-out deadline was not exercised.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Positive Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [The partnership successfully filled Vizcom's content gap.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [The article cadence is good, providing sufficient content for the new site.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [GrowthX's team has effective access to the Webflow CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

### New Website Launch & Content Staging

  - [The new website launch is delayed to the first week of January 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Reason:** Complete final QA with the agency and avoid holiday stress.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [**Status:** Sophia Silver and Emily Lonetto are finalizing the exact launch date.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [GrowthX has 10 articles staged in Webflow, ready for publication post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**CMS Issue:** Sydney (GrowthX editor) reported an inability to add alt text to images in the new CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Vizcom Action:** Emily Lonetto will investigate and create a Loom video tutorial for the new blog's features, including alt text.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Image Quality & Branding

  - [**Problem:** AI-generated images in articles do not meet Vizcom's brand standards, which is critical for their visually-focused audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX designer Katya will create new examples for featured and inline images.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Process:** Katya will use Vizcom's Figma files → Aida Knezevic will share the examples in Slack and provide the Figma source file for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Performance Tracking Blocker

  - [**Problem:** Google Search Console (GSC) is not tracking any data, making it impossible to measure content performance on the new site.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Urgency:** This is a top priority for both teams, as tracking must be active from the moment the new site and articles go live.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Context:** Vizcom's CTO recently switched the primary domain to `.com`, which was intended to fix the GSC issue per Google's documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Solution:** Aida Knezevic will find a GrowthX GSC expert to help Vizcom troubleshoot the property, potentially by creating a new one.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily Lonetto (Vizcom):**](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Finalize and communicate the new website launch date.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Create and share a Loom video tutorial for the new blog's CMS features, including alt text.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Aida Knezevic (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Share Katya's new image examples and Figma source file in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Find a GrowthX GSC expert to help Vizcom troubleshoot the tracking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new articles by the end of this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Provide regular, shareable performance reports to the Vizcom team (Sophia, Maura, Kim) to support Emily Lonetto's upcoming mat leave.](https://fathom.video/share/Tqqg36jXhrVCLUzz2JJwGHvyx_kr5zha?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
